entities.name: Notion
entities.context: Database/workspace used for storing job listings, accessed via API

entities.name: short.io
entities.context: URL shortening service used to create tracking links for new job postings

relationships.context: Job listings fetched from Notion trigger short.io link creation for new entries
Newly created short.io links are recorded to the tracking file
